message:
fix(mermaid): fix low-severity parser, render, and layout bugs

Parser (mermaid.rs):
- Handle gantt title:/section: colon variants (Finding 4)
- Skip known gantt directives (dateFormat, axisFormat, etc.) (Finding 6)
- Reject sequence control labels containing arrow patterns (Finding 5)
- Warn on forward-reference note participants (Finding 3)
- Warn on orphaned else/and without matching alt/par block (Finding 8)

Render (mermaid_render.rs):
- Use saturating_add for sequence control label_x (BUG 4)
- Use saturating_add for gantt bar_start_x, bx0, bx1 (BUG 7)
- Clamp f64-to-u16 casts with .min(u16::MAX) in gantt bars

Layout (mermaid_layout.rs):
- Guard label_rect width/height with .max(0.0) to prevent negative
  dimensions when node rect is smaller than 2x label_padding (BUG 2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
